title: VLoad Method, Spel Class
description: Loads vision properties from the current EPSON RC+ project.
notes: Use the VLoad method when you want to return the vision property settings, models, and fonts back to their original settings when the program was started.
see_also:
VSave

VLoad Example

VB Example:

m_spel.VLoad()

C# Example:

m_spel.VLoad();
